description: Probe run to validate run_experiment command acceptance timed out (no benchmark metrics).

asi.hypothesis: run_experiment might accept env-prefixed autoresearch.sh commands
asi.rollback_reason: timeout without metrics; this was a tooling probe, not a real benchmark
asi.next_action_hint: run actual benchmark command and capture METRIC lines

description: Baseline JIT run crashed before METRIC output (BasiliskII aborted in autoresearch.sh with set -e).

asi.hypothesis: Run JIT=true baseline through existing autoresearch.sh with AArch64 experimental configure
asi.rollback_reason: Script exited on emulator abort before emit_metrics; no datapoint captured
asi.next_action_hint: Make autoresearch.sh robust to Basilisk process abort so metrics are emitted even on crash

description: Baseline JIT=true run via autoresearch.sh with AArch64 experimental build mode. Reproduced vm_acquire_reserved assertion (reserved_assert=1).

asi.hypothesis: Current MAP_FIXED low-address path in vm_acquire_mac bypasses reserved pool setup and causes vm_acquire_reserved assert
asi.allocator_observation: Crash occurs in video_open before BOOT_STAGE markers; build succeeds
asi.next_action_hint: Move low-address bias into vm_alloc reservation path and revert vm_acquire_mac to normal vm_acquire flow

description: Move low-address strategy into VM allocator hint path; remove AArch64 MAP_FIXED from vm_acquire_mac; gate JIT block pool off VM_MAP_32BIT on ARM64. JIT run now survives full 20s and reserved assertion is gone.

asi.hypothesis: Initial mmap hint at low base should keep allocator reservation low without violating reserved_buf invariants
asi.result: reserved_assert dropped from 1 to 0; jit_alive_sec improved 0->20
asi.dead_end_avoided: No MAP_FIXED use in vm_acquire_mac, preventing reserved pool bypass
asi.next_action_hint: Validate low-address placement more directly and check deeper boot/JIT progression beyond alive-20s

description: Strengthened low-address allocator: AArch64 first reservation now probes low 4GB with MAP_FIXED_NOREPLACE fallback and advances next_address past reserved span. Verified Mac RAM/ROM and JIT cache now map low (mac_ram_low32=1).

asi.hypothesis: Hint-only mmap was insufficient; exact non-replacing low-address probe plus correct next_address advancement should keep all related mappings low
asi.primary_saturation_note: jit_alive_sec already capped at 20s; kept due objective-critical secondary confirmation (mac_ram_low32=1)
asi.evidence: Mac RAM 0x18000000, ROM 0x1c000000, JIT combined region 0x21110000
asi.next_action_hint: Re-initialize primary metric to low-address correctness score to avoid saturation blind spot
